text: Welcome to Top Dog Express. My name is Jeff Burr. I'd like to talk to you about our 30-minute
Express Wax. When was the last time you had your vehicle waxed? There's three reasons we got our
car waxed. UV protection from the floor to sunlight. The love bugs protect against damaging
your paint. It'll also keep your car looking new again. We'll take it down to the professional
detailer who will clean the inside and out, plus the wax. If you have any other questions,
find your customer service representative. We'd be glad to get that done in 30 minutes or less.
Until next time, I'm Jeff Burr.
